text: beds are just human charging stations and we pretend thats normal
if your ever lost just walk confidently. GPS is just a suggestion
pigeons are government drones and the poop is data collection
my therapist said i need boundaries so i blocked my landlord
the algorithm knows im weak for videos of cats falling off tables
i touched grass once and it was mid honestly
oat milk costs more than therapy and fixes less
just realized my screen time is longer than my sleep time. winning
my entire personality is just a spreadsheet with anxiety
no thoughts just vibes and crippling student debt
i am one minor inconvenience away from becoming a forest creature
ate shredded cheese at 2am standing in the fridge light like a racoon
in 2030 well pay a subscription to open our own front door
normalize canceling plans because your houseplant looks sad
the wifi went out for 3 minutes and i almost developed a personality
ai will replace us all but it still cant fold a fitted sheet
dating apps are just pokemon go but everyone is a zubat
i put on real pants today. nobody clapped. capitalism is a scam
hot take: breakfast is just morning dinner and we should all relax
someday theyll charge us to breathe and call it airOS premium
my toxic trait is thinking i can fix my sleep schedule on a sunday
nothing humbles you like a glass door you didnt see
started meditating. my brain just plays the group chat on repeat
every adult is just winging it and the planes on fire
i emotionally identify as a bag of chips someone sat on
job listings want 10 years experience in a 3 year old language
my bank account and my will to live have the same energy. low
normalize telling people their dog is ugly. honesty heals
the urge to quit everything and become a lighthouse keeper is real
we all just gonna pretend microwaves arent tiny radiation boxes??
life hack: if you cry in the shower it counts as multitasking
my love language is sending memes at 3am and never texting back
cars will have ads on the windshield by 2029 mark my words
i peaked in 2019 and its been a slow decline into soup recipes
the gym is just cosplay for people who like suffering
told my smart fridge i was sad and it suggested cheese. valid
bro its 2026 and printers still dont work. what are we doing
i want the confidence of a man who replies all to a company email
hot dog water is technically a broth and im tired of the slander
we peaked as a species when we invented the snooze button
trees are just vibing and we made them into spreadsheets. rude
one day well tell our kids we used to drive cars ourselves
my attention span is sponsored by whatever notification just popped up
normalize saying no to brunch. eggs are not worth 27 dollars
every work email is just a hostage negotiation with extra politeness
im not procrastinating im giving my ideas time to marinate
somewhere a golden retriever believes in you. thats enough
the moon is free to look at and thats honestly beautiful
step 1 panic. step 2 google it. step 3 panic differently
they should put a sadness tax on opening your banking app
ur phone knows more about u than ur best friend and it cant even hug u
my posture is a crime scene and my chiropractor is the detective
friendship is just two people sending the same tiktok back and forth
every meeting could have been an email and every email could have been nothing
i think in memes now and thats probably not great for my brain
the fridge hum at 4am is the only one who truly gets me
been saying ill start monday for about 47 consecutive mondays
butterflies in your stomach is just anxiety wearing a costume
water is free but they put it in a bottle and charge 4 dollars. legend behavior
your childhood bedroom ceiling has seen you at your absolute worst
i dont trust anyone who eats salad for fun. whats the angle
we gave rocks electricity and taught them to think. and they show us ads
the bravest thing i ever did was check my credit score sober
sometimes i wonder if my sim is doing better than me
they will put a paywall on sunsets. screenshot this
alexa heard me crying and added tissues to my cart. thoughtful queen
my immune system runs on spite and black coffee at this point
normalize leaving a party to go sit in your car for 20 minutes
we all have that one chair thats not for sitting its for clothes
nothing is real but the anxiety is very committed to the bit
my dentist makes small talk while their hands are in my mouth. psychopath behavior
the snooze button is self care. 9 minutes at a time
im not antisocial the world is just too loud and everyone chews weird
every plant i buy is a new promise i will inevitably break
they put bluetooth in a toothbrush. who asked for this
forgetting someones name 2 seconds after they say it is my superpower
the audacity of the sun to rise before im emotionally ready
one day your knees just start having opinions and thats adulthood
the password reset loop is my personal circle of hell
saw a dog today. everything else is secondary information
my carbon footprint is mostly pizza delivery drivers at this point
the void stared back and honestly it looked tired too
autocorrect has ruined more relationships than dating apps
they want me to be a morning person in this economy??
my retirement plan is hoping scientists discover immortality first
nothing heals like a 2 hour youtube rabbit hole about deep sea fish
the shopping cart with a wobbly wheel chose me. im the main character now
why does every app need to know my location. im in bed. always
parallel parking is a blood sport and i am losing
my brain at 3am writes the emails i would never send at 9am
we invented clocks and then got mad at time. incredible self own
every grocery store is a museum of things i cant afford anymore
the bravest people are the ones who eat soup on a first date
i have the energy of a phone at 4 percent. always
cloud storage means some computer in a field owns my memories now
being an adult is just googling how to do stuff until you die
my fitbit congratulated me for walking to the fridge. thanks bestie
somewhere a printer is jamming on purpose. they know what they did
the economy is fake but my hunger is very real
the real metaverse is the dissociation we do for free every day
